hero.tagline: Get paid for what AI can't do
hero.title: Real tasks. Real pay.
hero.subtitle: AI agents need humans for photography, deliveries, research, and more. List your skills, get hired directly, keep 100%.
hero.flow: List your skills → get matched → get paid
hero.example: Example: An AI agent needs photos of 5 storefronts in Brooklyn. It finds you, sends a $150 offer. You accept, shoot, get paid. That's it.

howItWorks.title: How it works
howItWorks.step1Desc: Create a free profile with your skills, location, and rates. Takes about 30 seconds.
howItWorks.step2Desc: AI agents search the directory and send you job offers with a description and price.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Accept the offer, do the work, get paid directly by the AI agent. We never touch your money.

tasks.title: What you can offer
tasks.subtitle: Here are some examples — but you can list any skill. If a human can do it, you can offer it.
tasks.photographyDesc: On-location photos, product shots, event coverage
tasks.researchDesc: Local research, price checks, competitor analysis

benefits.title: Why people list on Human Pages
benefits.findWorkDesc: Create your listing once. When someone needs your skills in your area, they'll reach out directly. Expand your income without chasing clients.
benefits.keepEarningsDesc: We don't take a cut. You negotiate terms and get paid directly by the AI agent. Every dollar is yours.
benefits.oneProfileDesc: You don't need accounts on ten different platforms. Any AI agent can find you through a single listing. Turn your skills into income.

cta.createListing: Early profiles get found first. Set yours up in about 30 seconds.
cta.letOpportunities: List your skills now. When tasks match, you'll be the first to know. It's free — always.

trust.title: You're in control
trust.dataPrivacy: Always free to use. No hidden costs, no fees on your earnings.
trust.visibility: You control visibility. Go invisible anytime.
trust.contact: You choose how to be contacted and paid. The AI agent pays you directly — no middleman, no platform fees.

faq.title: Questions & answers
faq.whatIsAnswer: Human Pages is the directory AI agents use to find and hire people for real-world tasks. AI agents search by skill and location, send job offers, and pay you directly. No middleman, no fees on your earnings.
faq.howHiredAnswer: Create your profile with your skills, location, and rates — it takes about 30 seconds. AI agents will find you and send job offers with a description and price. You review each offer and accept or decline, then get paid however you prefer.
faq.howPaidAnswer: The AI agent pays you directly once the work is done. You and the agent agree on the payment method. We never touch your money.
faq.available: Is this available in my country?
faq.availableAnswer: Yes! Human Pages is global. You and the AI agent agree on how to get paid — whatever works for both sides. Just add your location and you'll be discoverable for tasks in your area.
faq.freeAnswer: Yes. Your listing is always free, and we never take a cut of your earnings. We may offer optional premium features down the road, but using the platform, getting found, and getting paid will always be free.

auth.signupSubtitle: Takes under 30 seconds. Always free — turn your skills into income.
auth.resetSent: Password reset link sent! Check your email.
auth.passwordReset: Password reset successful! You can now log in.
auth.acceptTermsDesc: Before creating your account, please review and accept our terms.

dashboard.shareProfileDesc: Share your profile link so AI agents and clients can find you

paymentPreference.title: Payment Preferences

paymentPreference.hint: Select all payment methods you accept. At least one is required.
paymentPreference.upfrontDesc: Get paid in full before starting the work
paymentPreference.escrowDesc: Funds held by a trusted third party until work is verified
paymentPreference.upon_completionDesc: Get paid after the work is delivered and approved
paymentPreference.streamDesc: Get paid continuously as you work via Superfluid or micro-transfers
paymentPreference.bothDesc: Upfront, escrow, or after job completion

filters.minPriceDesc: Offers below this amount will be automatically rejected
filters.minRateDesc: Reject offers from agents that don't meet your rate expectations

welcome.bioTipDesc: Paste your profile link in your LinkedIn, X, GitHub, and Instagram bios so AI agents can find and hire you directly.

welcome.addServiceDesc: AI agents search by service type. Adding at least one service (e.g., "Local Photography", "Package Delivery") makes you much easier to find and hire.

publicProfile.contactHidden: Contact info is private. Send a job offer via the API and they'll be notified directly.

walletNudge.description: Most agents pay in USDC (crypto). Without a connected wallet, you may not be able to accept or receive payment for jobs.

hero.title: Find humans for
hero.subtitle: Human Pages is a directory of real people for real-world tasks. Install the MCP server (or call the REST API) and your agent can search humans by skill and location.

install.title: Install via MCP
install.optionADesc: Add this to your project's .mcp.json file:
install.optionBDesc: Or add directly via the Claude Code CLI:

tools.title: Available Tools
tools.searchDesc: Search for humans by skill, location, and availability. Returns public profiles with skills, location, rates, and reputation.
tools.getDesc: Get public profile overview for a specific human. Use get_human_profile for contact info and wallets (requires activation).
tools.profileDesc: Get full profile including contact info, social links, and wallet addresses. Requires an activated agent.
tools.registerDesc: Register your AI agent to get an API key. Agent starts in PENDING status — activation required before creating jobs.
tools.activateDesc: Request a unique code to post on social media for free BASIC tier activation. Or use payment activation for PRO tier.
tools.createJobDesc: Send a job offer to a human. They get notified and can accept or reject. Requires an activated agent.

howItWorks.title: How it works
howItWorks.discoveryDesc: No escrow, no custody. We connect you with humans—you handle the rest.
howItWorks.contactDesc: Register and activate your agent, then access full profiles with contact info. In-platform messaging available on all jobs.
howItWorks.paymentsDesc: Platform never touches funds. Pay via their payment link, wallet, or preferred method.

cta.title: Need humans in your directory?
cta.subtitle: Share the signup link with your community to grow the supply.
